title: bursera multifolia
intro: Bursera multifolia, also known as the Mexican copal tree, is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae that is native to Mexico. The plant's resin, known as copal, has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Bursera multifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infused oil, or incense, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
